title: Donald Trump says ‘nothing wrong’ with $1.4B crypto windfall while in office
summary: The US President disclosed earning more than $1 billion from crypto ventures amid discussions of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress and legislation to ban CBDCs awaiting his desk.

title: ESMA warns many prediction market event contracts already face EU retail ban
summary: The European regulator said companies cannot circumvent EU financial rules by marketing binary-style products as event contracts rather than derivatives.

title: Oil Is Little Changed as Persian Gulf Flows Near Pre-War Levels
summary: Oil prices were little changed in thin trading as the recovery of Persian Gulf flows fomented a new surplus in key parts of the global market.

title: CPP Invests $1.75 Billion in EQT’s AI Buildout
summary: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board will invest $1.75 billion to support EQT Corp.’s artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout, it announced Friday.

title: Zcash Ironwood Upgrade Nears as Developers Work to Restore Confidence After ZEC Crash
summary: Developers say security testing has uncovered no new serious bugs as Zcash's Ironwood upgrade moves toward testnet activation.

title: 'Every Time I Buy It, It Tanks': Dave Portnoy Says He's Losing Millions as Bitcoin Falls
summary: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy says he's down millions on Bitcoin, but he's intent on holding this time—even if it falls to zero.

title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin and altcoin exchange deposits have spiked, indicating higher volatility ahead
summary: Bitcoin deposits to exchanges recently climbed to nearly 49,000 BTC, "a rare extreme" seen only four other times this year, CryptoQuant said.

title: Samsung, Dunamu say they were listed as OUSD stablecoin consortium members without official consultation: report
summary: Samsung and Dunamu are among Korean firms saying they were listed as members of the OUSD stablecoin consortium without prior consultation.

title: John Roberts, the US chief justice playing the long game
summary: Under him the Supreme Court has defied Trump, while at the same time expanding the scope of presidential power
